_recipe: Color-A-Cube mockup — rebuilt from release screenshots. Card art uses clean thumbnails from Art/Thumbnails (importSprites first); names/prices/ribbons/progress are real UI elements composed in overlays. Main nav + settings sidebar tabs share toggle groups (one active at a time); grids use flexible columns (columns omitted) inside scrolls so portrait aspect ratios wrap instead of clipping.

text.label:
THIS IS THE BIG ONE: COLOR-A-CUBE IS OFFICIALLY 1.0!

WE'VE ADDED A COLOR PALETTE AND BRUSH: A WHOLE NEW WAY TO PICK YOUR COLORS AND PAINT. MODELS LOOK BETTER THAN EVER NOW, WITH AMBIENT OCCLUSION GIVING THEM MORE DEPTH. THERE ARE ACHIEVEMENTS TO UNLOCK AS YOU GO, AND A REPLAY MODE THAT PLAYS BACK EXACTLY HOW YOU COLORED A MODEL, CUBE BY CUBE. YOU CAN ALSO GET A SNEAK PEEK AT THE PACKS AND MODELS COMING SOON.

NONE OF THIS WOULD HAVE HAPPENED WITHOUT YOU, THANK YOU FOR HELPING US GET HERE. THE FULL COLOR-A-CUBE IS FINALLY HERE!
THIS IS THE CUPID PACK, WHICH CONTAINS THESE MODELS:

- BOX O' CHOCOLATES        - CUPID
- FLOWER BOUQUET            - TEDDY BEAR
ARE YOU SURE YOU WOULD LIKE TO BUY BENCH?
